scope: Test portability follow-up to v0.4.1.2 hotfix. No source or behavior changes. Makes the memory-server-console-handlers gate pass on Linux CI.

trigger.root_cause: packages/memory-server/test/console.test.mjs had 8 hardcoded /Users/josegilbertoolivasibarra/... paths. Local macOS checkout passed; Linux CI failed existsSync() for the dist path and 7 file-content assertions that read console-web/src/index.html.
